product_overview: Lexiflow is a vocabulary learning app that helps users build and retain English words through a protected dashboard, personal vocabulary cards, CEFR onboarding, and AI-assisted writing practice. It combines progress tracking, spaced repetition, and guided feedback into a focused learning experience.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in to access the learning app
Complete a CEFR onboarding test to establish a starting level
View a dashboard that summarizes progress and daily learning focus
Browse, search, filter, and add personal vocabulary cards
Practice writing with target words and receive AI feedback
Review and use profile settings from the user profile page

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can register for a new account and sign in with email and password to access the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit registration form -> See success redirect to onboarding
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See invalid credentials error

features.name: CEFR Onboarding Test
features.description: Users answer vocabulary questions during onboarding to determine their CEFR level and continue into the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Answer multiple-choice vocabulary questions -> Submit level test -> View CEFR level result -> Proceed to dashboard

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Users see the main learning hub with streak progress, daily quest status, and vocabulary summary.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See streak, daily quest, and word catalog summary
Sign in -> Return to the protected dashboard -> Review the current learning focus

features.name: Vocabulary Cards
features.description: Users can view their vocabulary library, search and filter cards, and create new personal cards.
user_flows: Navigate to /cards -> View cards list with summary stats -> Search for a card by keyword -> Filter by status -> Filter by due date -> Review the updated list
Navigate to /cards -> Click Add Card action -> Fill original word, translation, and direction fields -> Submit the new card form -> See the new card in the list

features.name: AI Writing Challenge
features.description: Users can write a response with target words and receive AI-generated grammar and usage feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /practice -> Fill in writing text area -> Fill in target words field -> Submit writing challenge -> View AI feedback with corrections

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Users can access their profile page to review account-related settings and personal information.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Review profile and settings information

features.name: Authentication Guard
features.description: Signed-out users are redirected away from protected pages and back to login before continuing.
user_flows: Navigate to a protected route while signed out -> See redirect to /login -> Sign in -> Return to the protected page

routes.description: Main dashboard with streak, daily quest, and word catalog
User vocabulary cards list with filters and summary
Writing challenge and AI feedback practice page

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with email and password

features.name: Vocabulary Cards
features.description: View, filter, and create personal vocabulary cards
user_interactions: View cards list with summary stats
Search for a card by keyword
Click Add Card button to open form
Fill original word, translation, and direction fields
See the new card in the list

features.name: AI Writing Challenge
features.description: Submit writing and receive AI grammar/usage feedback

features.name: CEFR Onboarding Test
features.description: Answer vocabulary questions to determine CEFR level

features.name: Authentication Guard
user_interactions: Navigate to protected route while signed out
Sign in and return to protected page

known_limitations.issue: Login flow sets email-session cookie in local dev, not sb-access-token
known_limitations.impact: Tests should accept any auth cookie, not just sb-access-token
